metadata.centrePolicy:
General Conduct & Usage

* Conduct: Players must maintain respectful behaviour at all times. Aggressive or abusive conduct will not be tolerated.
* Dress Code: Appropriate sports attire is required. Non-marking court shoes are mandatory.
* Arrival Time: Please arrive at least 10 minutes before your session. Sessions will end strictly on time.
* Parking: Limited parking is available. Please park considerately. Racquet Rojak is not responsible for any loss or damage to vehicles.
* Equipment Use: Users are responsible for any damage caused to court equipment.
* Cleanliness: Please dispose of litter properly and help keep the courts clean.
* Food & Drink: No food or glass containers are permitted on court. Only water or sports drinks in closed bottles are allowed.
* Children & Guests: Children must be supervised at all times. Spectators must remain off-court.
* Right to Refuse: Racquet Rojak reserves the right to deny entry or remove any person not following our policies, without refund.

Cancellation & Refund Policy

* Cancellations are not permitted for any bookings made at Racquet Rojak.
* This applies to all bookings, regardless of booking method (AFA app, website, or direct booking).
* All bookings are strictly non-refundable and non-transferable.

Rescheduling Policy

* Rescheduling is permitted for bookings made via the AFA app, website, or directly with Racquet Rojak, subject to court availability.
* All reschedule requests must be made before the scheduled booking time.
* If a booked slot becomes unavailable due to unforeseen changes, Racquet Rojak will make every effort to provide an alternative slot.

metadata.centrePolicy:
Centre Policy:

*Paddle Rental Policy*

*Paddle rental and ball for sale are available  over the counter from 6:00am - 3:00am.*

Paddle rental: RM 5 per paddle, per session
Ball rental: RM 5 per ball, per session.

*Booking Changes*

* Strictly no refund, no rescheduling and no transfer, no carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
* With advance notice at least 48hours, Management reserves the right to reschedule online bookings where necessary.

*General Rules & Conduct*

* Please do not leave your valuables unattended. Management will not be responsible for any theft at the badminton or pickleball courts, or within the vicinity.
* Strictly no smoking or vaping within the sports facility. Smoking or vaping is only permitted in designated outdoor smoking areas.
* Management reserves the right to remove any person acting unruly or in violation of the Centre Policy. No refunds will be issued in such cases.

*Liability & Safety*

* Management shall not be held liable for any mishap, damage, loss, injury, or death arising from or in connection with the use of our sports facility and/or equipment.
* Vehicles and their contents are parked at the owner’s risk. Management does not accept responsibility for any loss or damage to vehicles or their contents within the premises.

*Policy Updates*

* Management reserves the right to amend this Centre Policy at any time, without prior notice.

Last updated on 13th Sep 2025

metadata.centrePolicy:
Centre Policy & Guidelines

1. No Cancellation Policy

* All bookings are final. Cancellations are not allowed once a booking is confirmed.

* No refunds are allowed under any circumstances, regardless of booking method (AFA app, website, or direct).

2. Weather-Related Rescheduling Policy

* Rescheduling is permitted only for weather-related reasons. Personal reasons will not be accommodated.

* We follow a 1-hour block policy for all bookings, whether you booked 1 hour, 2 hours, or more.

Before the game starts:

* If rain occurs before your game starts → A full reschedule will be provided upon request.

After the game has started:

For each 1-hour block:
* Played 30 minutes or less → 1-hour reschedule will be provided.

* Played more than 30 minutes → No reschedule will be offered.

Example:

For a 2-hour booking from 8:00–10:00 PM:

* If rain starts at 9:15 PM → You will get a 1-hour reschedule for the 9:00–10:00 PM block (played less than 30 minutes in that block).

3. Rescheduling Process

* Please contact our Customer Service Helpdesk via WhatsApp for all rescheduling requests.

* Our team will assist you to arrange the reschedule based on your original booking value.

Important Notes:

* Rescheduling is only for same-value bookings (e.g., 1-hour Standard Court → 1-hour Standard Court).

* Any additional hours or upgrades (e.g., Standard → VIP court) require a new booking via the AFA app or website.

4. Centre-Initiated Closures

* If the centre needs to close for internal reasons, you will be informed in advance.

* You may reschedule to a time slot of your choice, subject to court availability.

5. Court Availability & Management Discretion

* All reschedules are subject to court availability.

* Pickle Buddy Segamat reserves the right to make final decisions on all rescheduling matters.

6. No-Show Policy

* Bookings are forfeited with no refund or reschedule if you do not show up.


*Summary:*

* Cancellations → Not allowed.
* Rescheduling → Only for weather or centre-initiated closures.
* Contact Customer Service for reschedules.
* All adjustments subject to court availability and management discretion.

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation. These guidelines ensure fairness for all players while allowing us to provide the best possible experience.

metadata.centrePolicy:
[PLEASE TAKE NOTE]
Paddle rental / TITAN Pickleball Machine rental ONLY available from 9.30am onwards!

Court Usage Policy – PickleStory

To ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for all players, please adhere to the following court usage policies:

1. Booking & Payments
	•	Courts must be booked in advance through our official booking system or at the front desk.
	•	Full payment is required before court usage. No refunds for cancellations made less than 24 hours before the booking time.

2. Court Rules & Conduct
	•	Players must wear non-marking indoor sports shoes.
	•	Only pickleball is allowed unless prior approval is obtained.
	•	No food, chewing gum, or smoking inside the court area.
	•	Players must respect others by keeping noise levels reasonable and avoiding disruptive behavior.
	•	Do not enter the court before your scheduled time and vacate promptly after your session ends.

3. Safety & Liability
	•	Play at your own risk. The facility is not liable for injuries, lost items, or damage to personal belongings.
	•	Players must follow all safety guidelines and report any hazards or injuries to staff immediately.

4. Facility Care
	•	Keep the courts and surrounding areas clean. Dispose of trash in designated bins.
	•	Any damage caused to the facility due to negligence will be charged to the responsible party.

Failure to comply with these policies may result in suspension or banning from future bookings. Thank you for your cooperation!

Rain Policy:

Our court is outdoor, so rain may affect your session. We offer vouchers only (no cash refund) based on the situation:

* *Rain before session starts* → Inform us early = Full rebooking voucher
* *Rain within first 15 minutes* → Full rebooking voucher
* *Rain after 30 minutes* ↓
    * Booked 2 hours = 1-hour voucher
    * Booked 1 hour = No voucher

*(Voucher requests must be made on the same day and are subject to availability.)*

Early Access & Rescheduling Policy:

* An Early Access Booking Fee of RM10 per court* applies for bookings made before the date appears on our booking app. 
* Booking dates are only visible and available 8 days in advance from the current date and continue thereafter. This fee secures priority reservations outside the standard booking window.
* In addition, any *rescheduling of AFA bookings that falls outside the 1-week availability window shown in the app will incur a Rescheduling Fee of RM10 per court.* This charge applies to changes made beyond the app’s current visible booking range.

Cancellation & Refund Policy:

* Cancellations are only available for bookings made through the AFA app. Website bookings cannot be cancelled and non-refundable.
* Cancellations before 48 hours of the scheduled game: 100% refund to the AFA Stamina Wallet.
* Cancellations between 24–48 hours of the scheduled game: 50% refund to the AFA Stamina Wallet.
* Cancellations less than 24 hours before the scheduled game: No refund.
* All eligible refunds are credited to the AFA Stamina Wallet. Refunds cannot be withdrawn, transferred, or reversed.

Rescheduling Policy:

* Rescheduling is permitted for bookings made via the AFA app, the website, or directly with the Spin City, subject to availability.
* All reschedule requests must be made "48 hours" before the scheduled booking time and are subject to court availability.
* If a booked slot becomes unavailable due to unforeseen changes, we will make every effort to secure an alternative slot.

metadata.centrePolicy:
*Centre Policy:*

1. Booking & Payment

* All bookings must be made online through the official website (www.dsbclabuan.com) or via the AFA app.
* Full payment is required to confirm a booking.
* All bookings are strictly non-refundable and non-transferable, regardless of the booking method.
* Cancellations are not permitted under any circumstances.

2. Rescheduling

* Rescheduling is allowed, subject to court availability and management approval.
* Requests must be made before the scheduled booking time.
* Rescheduling applies to bookings made via the AFA app, the website, or directly with DSBC Sungai Labu.
* If a booked slot becomes unavailable due to unforeseen changes (e.g., maintenance, events), management will make every effort to secure an alternative slot.

3. Court Usage

* Please arrive at least 10 minutes before your booking time.
* Playing time includes setup and pack-up.
* Only water is allowed inside the court area; no food or other drinks are permitted.
* Proper non-marking sports shoes are required at all times.

4. Conduct & Safety

* Play responsibly and respect other players.
* Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.
* DSBC Sungai Labu is not responsible for injuries, accidents, or loss of personal belongings.
* Individuals who fail to comply with these policies may be denied access without any form of refund or adjustment.

5. Health & Fitness

* Do not play if you are unwell, injured, or carrying a contagious illness.
* Warm up properly before playing to reduce the risk of injury.
* Stop immediately and seek help if you experience dizziness, shortness of breath, or pain.

6. Management Rights

* DSBC Sungai Labu reserves the right to modify, reschedule, or cancel bookings due to maintenance, events, or other operational needs. In such cases, affected players will either be offered a reschedule or a refund.

2) Cancellations before 48 hours of the scheduled time: 100% refund to the AFA Stamina Wallet.
3) Cancellations between 24–48 hours of the scheduled time: 50% refund to the AFA Stamina Wallet.
4) Cancellations less than 24 hours before the scheduled time: No refund.
5) All eligible refunds are credited to the AFA Stamina Wallet. Refunds cannot be withdrawn, transferred, or reversed. No refund for website booking. 

*Rescheduling Policy:*

1) Rescheduling is permitted for all booking subject to Ancubic Pickleclub availability and decision making.
2) All reschedule requests must be made before the scheduled booking time.
3) If a booked slot becomes unavailable due to unforeseen changes, we will make every effort to secure an alternative slot.
4) To reschedule booking, please contact the Ancubic Pickleclub directly.

metadata.centrePolicy:
Cancellations and Refunds
To let you know of our cancellation policy, users are entitled to refunds based on the timing of the cancellation:
•⁠  ⁠100% Refund if cancellation is made more than 48 hours before the scheduled time.
•⁠  ⁠50% Refund if cancellation is made more than 24 hours but less than 48 hours before the scheduled time.
•⁠  ⁠No Refund if cancellation is made less than 24 hours before the scheduled time.

Bad Weather Policy
In the event of bad weather, users must be present at the court during the booked time slot to process a walk-in cancellation. A coupon will be issued for future use under the same booking type and pricing conditions.

Rescheduling Requests
Requests to change a booking time are subject to court availability and confirmation by The Picklz. While we will do our best to accommodate changes, they are not guaranteed and must align with the court schedule.

Code of Conduct
The Picklz reserves the right to refuse entry to individuals who fail to comply with the centre’s policies or code of conduct. No refunds will be provided in such cases.
